name: Andernach Chess
author: AGP
description: Andernach Chess: standard chess with one twist - a piece that makes a capture changes to the opponent's colour and stays on the capture square (so White capturing with a knight produces a Black knight). Kings are the sole exception: a king that captures keeps its colour, and a king is never created by a colour change. Non-capturing moves are normal. En passant counts as a capture and flips the pawn; a pawn that captures onto the last rank promotes and then changes colour. Castling, check, checkmate, stalemate and the usual draws are standard. White moves first.
